request = <FixtureRequest for <Function test_list_users>>
kwargs = {'test_username': 'testuser', 'user_list': [{'active_time': '2026-04-21T15:52:23Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-04-21T15:50:47Z', 'email': '', ...}]}

    def call_fixture_func(
        fixturefunc: _FixtureFunc[FixtureValue], request: FixtureRequest, kwargs
    ) -> FixtureValue:
        if inspect.isgeneratorfunction(fixturefunc):
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., Generator[FixtureValue]], fixturefunc)
            generator = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
            try:
                fixture_result = next(generator)
            except StopIteration:
                raise ValueError(f"{request.fixturename} did not yield a value") from None
            finalizer = functools.partial(_teardown_yield_fixture, fixturefunc, generator)
            request.addfinalizer(finalizer)
        else:
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., FixtureValue], fixturefunc)
>           fixture_result = fixturefunc(**kwargs)

2026/04/21 15:54:21.878336587 if (!missing(compress))
2026/04/21 15:54:21.878337328 new$compress <- compress
2026/04/21 15:54:21.878351039 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)

2026/04/21 15:54:21.878404519 "default"))

2026/04/21 15:54:21.878003468 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,

2026/04/21 15:54:21.878023298 {

2026/04/21 15:54:21.878126813 new$version <- version
2026/04/21 15:54:21.878127624 if (!missing(paper))
2026/04/21 15:54:21.878143017 new$paper <- paper
2026/04/21 15:54:21.878143718 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/04/21 15:54:21.878162146 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/04/21 15:54:21.878164449 if (!missing(bg))
2026/04/21 15:54:21.878187254 new$bg <- bg
2026/04/21 15:54:21.878188195 if (!missing(fg))
2026/04/21 15:54:21.878198050 new$fg <- fg
2026/04/21 15:54:21.878206372 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/04/21 15:54:21.878207193 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/04/21 15:54:21.878221415 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/04/21 15:54:21.878243007 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/04/21 15:54:21.878270278 if (!missing(colormodel))

2026/04/21 15:54:21.878284669 if (!missing(useDingbats))

2026/04/21 15:54:21.878299371 if (!missing(useKerning))

2026/04/21 15:54:21.878321895 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/04/21 15:54:21.878322556 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/04/21 15:54:21.878336587 if (!missing(compress))
2026/04/21 15:54:21.878337328 new$compress <- compress
2026/04/21 15:54:21.878351039 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/04/21 15:54:21.878351770 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/04/21 15:54:21.878371049 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {

2026/04/21 15:54:21.878385581 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/04/21 15:54:21.878386502 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/04/21 15:54:21.878404519 "default"))
2026/04/21 15:54:21.878405210 old$encoding <- enc
2026/04/21 15:54:21.878417939 family <- family$metrics
2026/04/21 15:54:21.878418780 }
2026/04/21 15:54:21.878429356 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")

2026/04/21 15:54:21.878453261 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/04/21 15:54:21.878454203 if (length(family) == 4L) {

2026/04/21 15:54:21.878466802 }
2026/04/21 15:54:21.878480052 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/04/21 15:54:21.878480763 }
2026/04/21 15:54:21.878513321 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/04/21 15:54:21.878514393 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]

2026/04/21 15:54:21.878552390 domain = NA)
2026/04/21 15:54:21.878553171 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/04/21 15:54:21.878568184 }
2026/04/21 15:54:21.878568955 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/04/21 15:54:21.878613461 old$family <- family
2026/04/21 15:54:21.878614363 }

2026/04/21 15:54:21.878753962 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/04/21 15:54:21.878754593 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,
2026/04/21 15:54:21.878770337 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
